tool_args.label: Metro-North November 2023 total ridership
tool_args.raw_text: President Rinaldi stated that November's total ridership of almost 5.3 million represented a slight, yet predictable, dip from October given the Thanksgiving holiday.

evidence_refs.source_quote: November's total ridership of almost 5.3 million

tool_args.label: Metro-North post-COVID Saturday ridership record Dec 9 2023
tool_args.raw_text: The combination of nice weather, holiday activities and SantaCon combined to give us a new post-COVID Saturday ridership mark of 147,745 on December 9.

evidence_refs.source_quote: a new post-COVID Saturday ridership mark of 147,745 on December 9

tool_args.label: Metro-North November 2023 OTP
tool_args.raw_text: Systemwide on-time performance ("OTP") for November was 97.1%, which is above goal of 94%.

tool_args.label: LIRR November 2023 ridership
tool_args.raw_text: President Free stated that LIRR ridership continues its steady growth. President Free stated that November's total ridership (5.8 million customers) was down 3.1% from October

tool_args.label: LIRR November 2022 to November 2023 ridership change
tool_args.raw_text: it increased 22.3% compared to November 2022

tool_args.label: LIRR November 2023 ridership as % of November 2019
tool_args.raw_text: represented 81% of November 2019 ridership, the very first time since the pandemic that the LIRR exceeded 80% of the same month in 2019

tool_args.label: LIRR non-commutation ridership November 2023 vs 2019
tool_args.raw_text: November was the third consecutive month that non-commutation ridership surpassed the same month in 2019, this time exceeding it by a record 10.4%.

tool_args.label: LIRR November 2023 OTP
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR's OTP for November was 93.6%, below goal of 94%.

tool_args.label: LIRR MDBF October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: the MDBF for the month of October was 193,968 miles, above goal of 170,000 miles.

tool_args.label: LIRR new service plan added 271 trains (41% increase)
tool_args.raw_text: On February 27, LIRR introduced its new service plan, a revolutionary systemwide timetable that, in one day, added 271 trains for an astonishing 41% increase in service.

payload.raw_value_text: 271 trains for an astonishing 41% increase in service
payload.label: new service plan train increase

tool_args.label: LIRR service delivery November 2023
tool_args.raw_text: for service delivery, LIRR completed 99.6% of its trips for the month of November

tool_args.label: LIRR total additional trains operated in 2023 vs prior year
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR operated 70,000 more trains than it did last year and 49,000 more trains than in 2019.

payload.raw_value_text: 70,000 more trains than it did last year

tool_args.label: LIRR additional trains vs 2019
tool_args.raw_text: 49,000 more trains than in 2019.

tool_args.label: LIRR reverse peak service increase
tool_args.raw_text: The service plan also increased overall reverse peak service by 56%.

payload.raw_value_text: increased overall reverse peak service by 56%

tool_args.label: LIRR Brooklyn service increase
tool_args.raw_text: The schedules provide a 30% increase in Brooklyn service

tool_args.label: Metro-North LaserTrain system availability improvement
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's system availability improved from 70% to 98%, contributing to its best slip-slide season on record.

tool_args.label: Metro-North track miles covered by LaserTrain
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North doubled the number of tracks safely covered from 12,000 miles to 24,000 miles this year.

payload.raw_value_text: doubled the number of tracks safely covered from 12,000 miles to 24,000 miles
payload.label: LaserTrain track coverage

tool_args.label: Metro-North slip-slide events per mile operated reduction
tool_args.raw_text: the lowest number of slip-slide events per mile operated, which was a 66% reduction compared to the historical average

payload.raw_value_text: 66% reduction compared to the historical average
payload.label: slip-slide events per mile operated

tool_args.label: Metro-North slip-slide delay minutes reduction
tool_args.raw_text: the lowest number of slip-slide delay minutes per mile operated, which is a 74% reduction

payload.raw_value_text: 74% reduction compared to the historical average
payload.label: slip-slide delay minutes per mile operated

tool_args.label: Metro-North customer employee injury rate change
tool_args.raw_text: The customer employee injury rate for the 12-month reporting period ending October 2023 compared to the prior twelve months ending October 2022 decreased from 2.41 to 1.93 per one million customers.

payload.raw_value_text: decreased from 2.41 to 1.93 per one million customers

tool_args.label: Metro-North employee lost time injury rate change
tool_args.raw_text: The reportable employee lost time injury rate decreased from 2.21 to 1.95 per 200,000 hours worked compared to the prior twelve months.

payload.raw_value_text: decreased from 2.21 to 1.95 per 200,000 hours worked

tool_args.label: MTAPD November 2023 major felonies for LIRR and Metro-North
tool_args.raw_text: for the month of November there were 26 major felonies for the two railroads.

payload.raw_value_text: 26 major felonies for the two railroads

tool_args.label: MTAPD November 2023 robberies
tool_args.raw_text: Of the major crime categories, there were 7 robberies, 8 assaults, and 9 grand larcenies.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison opening for customers
tool_args.raw_text: Grand Central Madison received customers for the very first time on Wednesday, January 25, when shuttle service kicked off with special guest Governor Kathy Hochul, who was a tremendous supporter of this project, and Chair Janno Lieber, among many other distinguished guests.

payload.description: Grand Central Madison received customers for the very first time on Wednesday, January 25, when shuttle service kicked off with special guest Governor Kathy Hochul and Chair Janno Lieber

tool_args.label: LIRR new service plan introduction
tool_args.raw_text: On February 27, LIRR introduced its new service plan, a revolutionary systemwide timetable that, in one day, added 271 trains for an astonishing 41% increase in service.

payload.description: LIRR introduced its new service plan, a revolutionary systemwide timetable that, in one day, added 271 trains for an astonishing 41% increase in service

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison 1 millionth customer
tool_args.raw_text: Grand Central Madison welcomed its 1 millionth customer in April

payload.description: Grand Central Madison welcomed its 1 millionth customer in April

tool_args.label: Metro-North annual emergency preparedness exercise
tool_args.raw_text: on December 11, Metro-North conducted its federally mandated annual emergency preparedness exercise in Norwalk, Connecticut. This year the exercise simulated technical rescue of a contractor injured inside the central pivot pier of the Norwalk River Railroad Bridge or Walk Bridge.

payload.description: Metro-North conducted its federally mandated annual emergency preparedness exercise in Norwalk, Connecticut, simulating technical rescue of a contractor injured inside the central pivot pier of the Norwalk River Railroad Bridge (Walk Bridge)

tool_args.label: Last day of LaserTrain operation
tool_args.raw_text: this past Friday was the last day of operation for the LaserTrain.

payload.description: this past Friday was the last day of operation for the LaserTrain

tool_args.label: LIRR new timetable January 22
tool_args.raw_text: on January 22, a new timetable will be implemented. It includes two new PM Peak trains from Atlantic Terminal, one to Far Rockaway and one to Hempstead and adding a new train from Hicksville to Grand Central Madison, making local stops in the AM Peak. The 6:57 AM from Huntington to Grand Central Madison will now operate express from Syosset to Jamaica.

payload.description: a new timetable will be implemented. It includes two new PM Peak trains from Atlantic Terminal, one to Far Rockaway and one to Hempstead and adding a new train from Hicksville to Grand Central Madison, making local stops in the AM Peak.

payload.claim_text: accomplishments this year included a pair of APTA Gold Awards in June; an APTA Innovation Award in October

tool_args.label: Metro-North 2023 OTP over 97%
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North ends the year with more consistently high marks from customers and an OTP of over 97%.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North ends the year with more consistently high marks from customers and an OTP of over 97%

tool_args.label: 2023 most transformational year in LIRR history
tool_args.raw_text: 2023 was arguably the most transformational year in LIRR's long rich history. The defining event was LIRR's long-awaited opening of Grand Central Madison

payload.claim_text: 2023 was arguably the most transformational year in LIRR's long rich history. The defining event was LIRR's long-awaited opening of Grand Central Madison

tool_args.label: First LIRR service extension since 1910
tool_args.raw_text: This marked the first extension of LIRR service since its initial train to Penn Station way back in 1910.

payload.claim_text: This marked the first extension of LIRR service since its initial train to Penn Station way back in 1910.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: LIRR November 21 slip-slide incident
tool_args.raw_text: The most significant event occurred on November 21, from a low adhesion condition from excessive slip-slide and a low-speed restriction being put in place. This incident caused 131 delays and reduced our monthly OTP by 0.5%.

payload.claim_text: The most significant event occurred on November 21, from a low adhesion condition from excessive slip-slide and a low-speed restriction being put in place. This incident caused 131 delays and reduced our monthly OTP by 0.5%.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: Three LIRR procurement items totaling $17M
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Assistant Deputy Chief Contracts Officer Richard Mack reported on three procurement items for an estimated total of $17M.

payload.claim_text: MTA Assistant Deputy Chief Contracts Officer Richard Mack reported on three procurement items for an estimated total of $17M: 1) $10.2M to Custom Glass Solution for window assemblies; 2) $2.2M to Luminator Technology Group for lighting equipment; 3) $4.6M to United Safety & Survivability Corporation for engineering seats. All three are five-year noncompetitive OEM joint-agency sole-source contracts.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road
